chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Const. Petition No.D-2573 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATUREs OF JUDGEs Direction For orders as to maintainability of petition ---------------------------------------------- 03.10.2025 Mr. Muhammad Nishat Warsi, advocate for petitioner Ms. Wajiha Maryam Mehdi, Assistant Attorney General -------------------------- Learned Assistant Attorney General has referred the statement dated 09.09.2025 filed by the petitioner to withdraw this petition but the same is not available in the Court file. Learned Assistant Attorney General shall ensure that the said statement is placed in the Court file. Accordingly, this petition is dismissed as not pressed along with pending application(s), if any. HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES J U D G E Gulsher/PS
